creator: timon@timon.net.nz
text:
Created attachment 175947
Patch for Makefile, distinfo & files directory

Hi,

This is a patch to unbreak and update sysutils/i7z.
* Project moved to github (link from google-code page)
* Port updated to last master commit (there is no tags/branches in github yet)
* All patches regenerated with make makepatch
* Version changed from "0.27.2" to "svn-r93-(27-MAY-2013)", so I just convert it to 20130527
